verdict.note: positive/invalid parsing and GitHub-shaped windows passed

Reproduced: #/evals painted 25 rows, then each of two board deltas (session rename tick+restore) wiped the list to the lp-empty 'loading…' state (aria-busy=true) before repainting identical rows — refreshKey (specs/sessions array identity) reruns useReviewPage's effect which setData(null)s on every board frame.

Same scenario, fixed tree: 25 rows painted, two board deltas (rename tick+restore) observed, zero wipes — MutationObserver saw no lp-empty/aria-busy transition; refreshKey now quiet-reloads and equal-revision answers repaint nothing.
